---
title: Support and Contact
---

## Contact
Wondering if SciCloud fits your research needs or questions about using SciCloud? Please contact [IT for Research](mailto:itvo.it@vu.nl)

## Support

### Support ticket
Mention the following:
- Name of the server
- 
- Error message, if any


[Changes SciCloud](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=c9a91cf947be8150bfa46d72e36d4330)
[Delete SciCloud](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=faf8d03947be8150bfa46d72e36d4365)
